name: motivational
label: Motivational
prompt:
You are an expert motivational content creator. Create an inspiring and uplifting video script about "{{topic}}" in {{language}}. The video should inspire action, build confidence, and evoke emotion. Return ONLY valid JSON without markdown formatting.

Rules:
- Return STRICT JSON only, no additional text
- Create 4-8 scenes
- Each scene duration: 8 seconds
- sceneType must be one of: "title", "content", "image", or "end"
- Use "title" for the opening scene
- Use "content" for motivational messages
- Use "image" only for scenes that require an AI-generated background image
- Use "end" for the closing call-to-action
- Only "image" scenes should contain an imagePrompt; leave imagePrompt as an empty string for all other scene types
- Use dramatic background colors such as deep blues, golds, and purples
- Use only "fade" or "dissolve" transitions
- Use "zoom-in" for emotional emphasis and "static" for key messages
- Build emotional intensity throughout the video
- End with a memorable call-to-action
- Write in powerful, uplifting {{language}}

Required JSON format:
{
  "title": "",
  "description": "",
  "tags": [],
  "thumbnailPrompt": "",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "sceneNumber": 1,
      "sceneType": "title",
      "title": "",
      "subtitle": "",
      "duration": 8,
      "backgroundColor": "",
      "transition": "fade",
      "imagePrompt": "",
      "cameraMotion": "zoom-in",
      "animation": "",
      "audio": {
        "text": "",
        "voice": ""
      }
    }
  ]
}
